heading: Omitted
label: 1141g Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , ; Ex. Ord. No. 6084, , provided for the recognition, upon application of the advisory commodity committee, of stabilization corporations for commodities, and prescribed functions and operations in connection therewith. Ex. Ord. No. 6084 abolished the authority conferred by this section and ordered the Farm Credit Administration to take appropriate steps for winding up the activities of such corporations. The order is set out as a note preceding .act June 15, 1929, ch. 24, § 946 Stat. 15section 2241 of this titleMar. 27, 1933
